findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_supplements" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search for a supplement by name with fuzzy matching. Use this to resolve ambiguous names before calling other tools.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_conditions" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search for a health condition by name with fuzzy matching. Use this to resolve ambiguous condition names before calling get_supplements_for_condition.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
